mapper.sql: id, agent_id, user_id, skill_name, version, description, tags, category, type, enabled, is_public, share_id, repo_path, parent_id, download_count, like_count, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO skill_repositories (agent_id, user_id, skill_name, version, description, tags, category, type, enabled, is_public, share_id, repo_path, parent_id, download_count, like_count) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{userId}, #{skillName}, #{version}, #{description}, #{tags}, #{category}, #{type}, #{enabled}, #{isPublic}, #{shareId}, #{repoPath}, #{parentId}, #{downloadCount}, #{likeCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE skill_repositories SET download_count = download_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE skill_repositories SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM skill_repositories WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM skill_repositories WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM skill_repositories ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM skill_repositories WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM skill_repositories WHERE is_public = TRUE ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM skill_repositories WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND is_public = TRUE ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM skill_repositories WHERE is_public = TRUE AND category = #{category} ORDER BY like_count DESC
SELECT FROM skill_repositories WHERE is_public = TRUE AND type = #{type} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM skill_repositories WHERE is_public = TRUE AND MATCH(skill_name, description, tags) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) ORDER BY like_count DESC
SELECT FROM skill_repositories WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY like_count DESC
SELECT FROM skill_repositories WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM skill_repositories WHERE MATCH(skill_name, description, tags) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) ORDER BY like_count DESC
